title: LLMS.txt
subtitle: Generate text using LLMs
ctaDescription: Start to generate the llms.txt for your site.

slides.question: What is llms.txt generator?
slides.answer: llms.txt is a file that is used to generate text using LLMs.

slides.question: Why use llms.txt?
slides.answer: It helps AI models understand your site structure, docs, and content more effectively.

slides.question: How does it work?
slides.answer: Enter your site URL and we crawl it to produce a clean, structured llms.txt file automatically.

slides.question: Who is it for?
slides.answer: Developers, documentation teams, and anyone who wants their content to be AI-ready and discoverable.
